Title: Enggass, Robert
Overview: Student of Harold E. Wethey at Ann Arbor. His friendship with Luigi Salerno in 1965 resulted in his translation with his wife, Catherine, in several of Salerno's books into English.
Sources: Julier, Insley. [finding aid for] Luigi Salerno research papers, 1948-1996. Getty Research Center. http://hdl.handle.net/10020/cifa2000m26.
